title: WeRChristmas Glass Christmas Tree Onion Baubles, Copper, 11 cm
features: Brown, Burnt Orange and Copper colour tones
Hang baubles freely using accompanying hanging thread
A mixture off glass matt, shiny and mottled effect baubles with glitter finishes
description: From the manufacturer We believe everyone should have their dream Christmas. We take pride in offering luxury Christmas Decorations helping you create your dream Christmas. All of our products are designed with you in mind and undergo a rigourous quality test helping you rest easy this Christmas. Copper Glass Christmas Tree Onion Bauble Pack, Set of 3, 11 cm Add heat and fire to your Christmas display with this stunning pack of 3 glass copper inferno onion baubles, equipped with matt and mottled effects with glitter finishes. Dangle the Christmas baubles with ease by using the included hanging string which comes in a gold colour to create an added element of flair to your tree. 3 glass baubles featuring onion shapes Brown, Burnt Orange and Copper colour tones Hang baubles freely using accompanying hanging thread A mixture off glass matt and mottled effect baubles with glitter finishes Size: 11 (height) x 10 (depth) centimetres Mesmerising Design & Fiery Copper Tones Decorate with a touch of class by showcasing these inferno themed baubles which feature matt and mottled effects with intricate glitter finishes. Each design is crafted to produce a blazing effect that radiates a warm vibe throughout your Christmas theme. This multipack features stunning onion bauble shapes with alluring burnt orange, brown and copper tones that will bring your Christmas tree to life.
